prompt: Create a vertical 9:16 ultra-realistic concert portrait of a young female pop singer, anonymous idol singer, standing close to the camera on a large arena stage. She has long dark brown hair in two loose braided pigtails with soft bangs and wears a pale blush-pink sparkly tulle mini dress with a fitted corset bodice, bow detail, thin straps, and layered ruffled skirt. She holds a black handheld microphone with a pink ring directly in front of her mouth, facing forward in a confident live-performance pose. Add a large rectangular privacy blur covering her face, plus three additional rectangular privacy blurs: one over her face on the giant video screen behind her and two small ones over audience faces near the lower left, for exactly four censor rectangles total. Behind her, show a packed indoor arena crowd with raised arms, phone screens, and many glowing pink and blue light sticks, with energetic bokeh and depth of field. On the right rear, include one huge LED screen showing the same singer from the waist up, slightly out of focus, wearing the same dress and holding a microphone. Across the top, include exactly six bright purple stage lights shining down, with magenta and violet concert lighting, haze, and cinematic contrast. Use realistic photography, wide concert portrait composition, sharp detail on the singer and dress texture, blurred crowd background, no text, no watermark.
